Steps.Message:
Sent by Aaron at 15:11 - Thank you for your patience while our engineers connected temporary generators to the the underground network in the Tonbridge TN12 area, we've now restored power to most of the affected properties. There are now only 2 properties without power, who will be restored when the final generator is connected. If you're without power and haven't been contacted, then we'll need to hear from you. Please call us on 08003163105 (free from landlines and mobiles).

We know that being without power can be especially difficult, so we're sorry for the unexpected outage and the length of time you were off. Please rest assured our staff will continue to work around the clock to keep the lights on.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message:
Hello, Aaron from the messaging team here. Thanks for your patience today, our field staff and control room engineers are working to get your power back on as quickly as they can.

Our records show that some properties affected by today's power cut may have had other unexpected interruptions recently. If you have, we're sorry for further disruption. All power cuts are fully investigated by our engineers but can sometimes happen multiple times before we can safely find the issue and fix it.

We know that not everyone affected by today's power cut will have had other power cuts recently, but we want you to know that if you have, our customer services team will try to update as many customers as possible about our investigations.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message:
Hello. Stuart, Roland and Aaron have now taken over, so we'll be here to pass on news from our field staff while works continue to get your lights back on.

We hope you're still holding up without power, we know it can be worrying but as soon as we have some more news we'll send you another message.

Steps.Message:
Thanks for bearing with us during the power cut tonight. Our staff have confirmed they have managed to restore power to the High Road EN10 area.

We believed the power cut was caused by a fault on our underground cables, however after investigations made by our field staff and our control room, we've discovered the issue was caused by an unexpected fault with some of our network equipment which has now been replaced, so we're sorry for the confusion.

I know an unexpected power cut can be very disruptive, so we apologise for the interruption. If your power isn't on, or if there's anything you'd like to talk to us about, call us on 08003163105 which is free from landlines and mobiles.

Sent by Simon at 00:41.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message:
Sent by Simon at 00:09 - Thanks for bearing with us tonight.

Our engineers are checking our substation equipment to ensure our network is healthy before they attempt to restore your power. They may also walk our cabling route throughout the area to check for any visible problems, check smaller electrical sites in the area, or apply specialist equipment which may restore power temporarily to help them with their testing.

We know that our customers may be worried about the food in the fridge and freezer, so we want to try and help with advice. Food should keep for up to 4 hours in the fridge, and between 24-48 hours in the freezer if you avoid opening them.

We'll keep you updated on our engineers progress.
